texts.full_text: : Halloween Do you long for new pictures of Brown’s campus to look at on a regular basis? Well look no further! My name is Brianna Lambert and I’ll be bringing you weekly photos depicting the life of a Brown student with Snapshots of Brown. Boo! Were you scared? Ok, probably not, but maybe you were scared this last weekend since it was Halloween. Brown students take Halloween very seriously. In fact, we take it so seriously that we’ve extended the holiday to encompass a whole week (Halloweek) instead of just oneday! This year's Halloweek at Brown University featured an array of events and activities designed to celebrate all things spooky and festive. From costume contests on campus, where students showcased their creativity with elaborate outfits ranging from classic characters like witches and vampires to more unique themes inspired by pop culture or personal interests, the energy was electric. The iconic College Green transformed into a bustling hub for trick-or-treating as both locals and visitors alike indulged in sweet treats. The University's dining halls also got into the spirit of Halloweek with special Halloween-themed menus that included everything from pumpkin spice lattes to ghostly desserts like eyeball-shaped cookies. These results show that bioaugmentation with MO had significant effects on TPH degradation and the microbial growth. The use of TX was found to be beneficial for both TPH degradation and microbial growth, possibly due to its ability to promote the activity of indigenous hydrocarbon-degrading microorganisms. In addition, the positive effect of using glucose as the carbon source is likely to have been due to the high initial C/N ratio in the oily sludge. texts.full_text: he length of a control frame to be exactly 64 bytes, which is the minimum frame length of all frames. When the MAC logic in an Ethernet controller receives a control frame, the MAC logic checks the frame length. If the control frame is 64 bytes, the MAC logic signals the frame to be a good frame (unless other unrelated errors occur, such as an incorrect checksum). If the control frame is less than 64 bytes in length, the MAC logic signals the frame as a bad frame. The restriction in IEEE 802.3 of the control frame length to exactly 64 bytes can result in inefficient operations from a systems perspective. For example, a user may want to concatenate several control commands in a proprietary format and encapsulate the control commands in a control frame. In such case, the length of the control command sequence might exceed 64 bytes, leading to complications since IEEE 802.3 strictly mandates that control frames must be exactly this size. This limitation can force system designers and network engineers into creating workarounds or using alternative methods for transmitting larger sets of commands efficiently over Ethernet networks. One potential solution is the use of fragmentation, where a longer sequence of proprietary control commands could be split across multiple 64-byte frames. However, this approach introduces additional complexity in terms of reassembly at the receiving end and managing frame order to ensure correct interpretation by network devices or applications processing these controls. Another method might involve using different types of Ethernet frames that are not subjected to such strict length restrictions for control purposes but still adhere within other constraints defined under IEEE 802 standards, thereby allowing more flexibility in the size and structure of transmitted data packets while maintaining compliance with established protocols. texts.full_text: n the late afternoon. I am on a 2 week program of “taking it easy” after an episode of doing too many pull-ups. I probably should have kept walking to the next beach over, which had smaller waves, more appropriate for taking it easy. But the waves on Mole looked so fun! I made a promise to myself and my tired shoulders that I would take it slow, even if it meant not catching much (which is exactly what it meant!). Sometimes, just being out there is a gift in itself, and today was one of those days. But I had an extra treat in store. As I was floating around amidst the other surfers, another woman paddled up to join the line-up. And it was none other than Jacqueline Silva — who, for those who don’t know, is a super amazing pro surfer who is on the ASP WORLD TOUR!! (you have to be one of the best 18 surfers IN THE WORLD to be on this tour). That’s a picture of her on the left! You can also check out her website here. She paddled right next to me, and was so nice and friendly when I nervously and excitedly introduced myself. Then she proceeded to SHRED like crazy just about every wave that came her way. It was completely amazing and inspiring to see her in action, and also really cool to encounter someone who is SO damn good at what she does and still totally open and kind, and willing to talk to a random American stuttering in Portuguese in the water next to her. Copyright in this image is owned by the 'Old Bailey Online' project. nThe proceedings from such a significant date at The Old Bailey would typically detail various criminal cases that were being heard and tried during those sessions. On Page Image of Proceedings: 8th February1904, page 9 One can expect to find case summaries ranging in severity -from minor thefts or vandalism- up until more severe crimes such as murder. This particular entry from the proceedings would provide a snapshot into how criminal justice was administered during that period. The 'Old Bailey Online' project has been instrumental towards preserving and providing access these historical documents, which serve not only to inform us about past legal practices but also offer insights on societal norms of those times -such as class distinctions in sentencing or the prevalence certain crimes at different points. It's important for historians (and enthusiasts) alike that such records are readily available online so they can be studied and analyzed, providing a better understanding not just how justice was served back then but also why it is what we do today. texts.full_text: li, the sensitivity of high-SPS individuals may affect their physiological reactions to stressors. Therefore, this study attempted to explore the effect of SPS on an individual's physiological reactions to stress. The study of SPS in the laboratory is a good way to test the effects of SPS on physiological reactions. The present paper reports three studies that used the Trier social stress test (TSST) and electrocardiography (ECG) to test whether high-SPS individuals are more sensitive to social threats. Methods {#section1-2055102919892} ======= Study 1 {#section1-2055102919893} -------- The participants were 40 undergraduates from a Chinese university (mean age = 20.73 years, SD = 1.57; 26 females). texts.full_text: BB Cream stands for Beauty Balm and CC Cream is short for Color Correcting. Both are essentially multi-taskers in the world of skincare routines: they offer coverage while also providing hydration, making them perfect additions to any beauty regimen whether you're heading out on a sunny day or just staying home from work. BB Creams 1. Hydration & Coverage: BB cream combines moisturizing ingredients with light-reflecting particles for even skin tone and reduced appearance of pores. 2. Sun Protection: Many BB cream options come loaded with SPF, helping to protect your skin from harmful UV rays. 3. Concealing Blemishes & Dark Spots: They often contain ingredients like niacinamide or vitamin C that help brighten and even out the complexion over time. 4. Versatility in Use: Some BB creams can be used as a primer, providing hydration without clogging pores. 5. Skincare Benefits Beyond Covering Up: They usually include ingredients beneficial for your skin like antioxidants and hydrating agents that contribute to overall skincare health. 6. Easy Application & Blending: Due to their lighter texture compared with foundation, they are often easier on the face without a heavy feel. CC Creams 1. Color Correction: These cream products help correct uneven skin tone by neutralizing redness and brightening under-eye areas. 2. Hydration & Radiance: The hydrating ingredients in CC cream work to keep your complexion looking healthy, plump, and radiant. 3. Easy Application: CC creams typically have a lightweight consistency that blends easily into the skin

texts.full_text: prospective, observational study of 491 consecutive cases reported to the Victorian Poisons Information Centre, between January 2006 and March 2007. A total of 450 (91.7%) parents/carers were followed up by telephone approximately 48 h after the initial call. The main outcome measures were the nature, causes and outcomes of the errors and actions taken or recommendations given to avoid future errors. The majority of children (334, 68.0%, 95% confidence interval (CI) 63.7, 72.1) were aged <or=3 years. Incorrect and double dosage accounted for 279 (56.8%, 95% CI 52.3, 61.2) and 128 (26.1%, 95% CI 22.3, 30.2) cases, respectively. Almost all errors occurred in the home (98.2%) and involved a single medication (98.8%) and the oral route (98.4%). Close family members were responsible in 408 (83.1%, 95% CI 79.4, 86.2) cases. Analgesics and cough and cold preparations were taken in error in 2520 (51.1%, 95% CI 45.6, 56.6) and 117 (23.8%, 95% CI 20.1, 27.9) cases, respectively. texts.full_text: 27, 1775, North’s Cabinet expanded on the proclamation in the Speech from the Throne read by the king at the opening of Parliament. The speech insisted that rebellion was being fomented by a "desperate conspiracy" of leaders whose claims of allegiance to the king were insincere; what the rebels really wanted, he said, was to create an "independent empire". The speech indicated that the king intended to deal with the crisis with armed force and was even considering "friendly offers of foreign assistance" to suppress the rebellion without pitting Briton against Briton. A pro-American minority in Parliament warned that the government was driving the colonists towards independence, something that many colonial leaders had insisted they did not desire. The Second Continental Congress issued a response to the proclamation on December 6, saying that while they had always been loyal to the king, the British Parliament never had any legitimate claim to authority over them, because the colonies were not democratically represented. Congress argued that it was their duty to continue resisting Parliament's violations of the British Constitution, and that they would retaliate if any supporters in Great Britain were punished for "favouring, aiding, or abetting the cause of American liberty". Congress maintained that they still hoped to avoid the "calamities" of a "civil war". The proclamation and the speech from the throne undermined moderates in the Continental Congress such as John Dickinson, who had been arguing that the king would find a way to resolve the dispute between the colonies and Parliament. When it became clear that the king was not inclined to act as a conciliator, colonial attachment to the empire was weakened, and a movement towards declaring independence became a reality, culminating in the United States Declaration of Independence on July 4, 1776. texts.full_text: A recent poll disclosed that 80% of Canadians believe that Canadian law protects the fundamental rights of children before birth in the later stages of gestation. In fact, the opposite is true. Canadian law provides no human rights protection whatsoever for children before the moment of complete birth. this results from an unusual Canadian statute which defines a human being as a child who has completely proceeded in a living state from the mother’s body, whether or not the child has breathed. This means that in Canada a child is legally considered to be sub-human while his or her little toe remains in the birth canal, even if he or she is breathing. This law was first formulated prior to the seventeenth century, when an early version of it was recorded in Coke’s Institutes of Law. In those times, medical science and principles of human rights were not sufficiently advanced to challenge such a law. The important question is whether this 400 year old Canadian law is supported by 21st century medical science and principles of human rights. Perhaps Canadians should at least examine this question. MP Stephen Woodworth proposes that Parliament has a responsibility to lead that examination. One Response to When are we human? texts.full_text: The difference in the symbols for an inverter (logic gate) is primarily a matter of style and context, rather than a difference in functionality. Both symbols represent the same logical operation: the output is the logical negation (inversion) of the input, often denoted as Q = not A. However, the choice of symbol can be influenced by the context in which the inverter is used and the designer's intent to convey information about the circuit's behavior to the reader. The first symbol, which is more commonly used, is the traditional representation of an inverter. It consists of a line with a bubble at the end, which is universally recognized as indicating an inversion or negation operation. This symbol is straightforward and immediately communicates the function of the gate to anyone familiar with digital logic. The second symbol, which includes an additional line or bar extending from the bubble, is less commonly used but can be found in certain contexts, particularly in more complex logic circuits. texts.full_text: minimization of the delay in the circuits. In ICs, Boolean circuits comprise trees to carry out certain Boolean functions. Typically, the Boolean circuits are created from a library of Boolean elements such as two-input AND and OR elements (cells) and NOT (inverter) elements or cells. The delay of Boolean circuits can ordinarily be minimized by minimizing the depth of the Boolean circuit. The maximal number of cells that lie on any path from any input of a Boolean circuit to the output of the Boolean circuit is called a depth of a Boolean circuit. Each cell along the path adds one to the depth of the circuit. Thus, a tree or subtree having a path containing eight cells has a depth of 8. The delay of a Boolean circuit increases with its depth. Considerable attention has been given to minimizing depth of Boolean circuits. Much of the attention has been directed at certain classes of Boolean functions (such as comparators, adders, subtractors, multipliers, etc), and to the development of techniques that allow fabricating Boolean circuits with small depth and small number of cells. In the present case, the development of techniques to minimize the depth of Boolean circuits, and to minimize the number of cells, is of great importance, and is the subject of ongoing research, with the goal of creating Boolean circuits with the smallest depth aNd the smallest number of cells, to minimize the delay and to maximize the speed of the circuits, and to reduce the complexity and the cost of the circuits, and to improve the overall performance of the integrated circuits, and to enable the creation of more complex and more powerful circuits, with more functionality and more capabilities, and to meet the increasing demands of the electronics and the computer industries, and to keep pace with the rapid advancements and the increasing complexity of the integ

texts.full_text: d to the preferred tetrahedral coordination (4 coordinate bonding) of lithium. Consequently, it is difficult to find a host material to accommodate Na ions and allow reversible and rapid ion insertion and extraction. Various transition metal sulfides can be employed in Na batteries, as well. The early first-row transition metal layered sulfides possess suitable properties, and the first work was directed primarily to binary metal sulfides, most notably, the prototype intercalation electrode, TiS2. The Ti(+3)/(+4) redox couple is about 1.8 to 2.0 V versus Na. Layered TiS2 provides soft bonding of Na to the sulfide atoms in the layers, and large gallery space between transition metal (TM) layer slabs to fit Na+, which allows facile reversible intercalation and deintercalation (also referred to herein, for convenience, as “(de)intercalation”). texts.full_text: a variety of applications to monitor data signals and provide output signals based on the data signals. For example, a sense amplifier typically is utilized in a memory array to read data from one or more bitlines. The bitlines are generally routed from a memory cell in the memory array to the sense amplifier via column decode pass gates. The Sense amplifier reads the data and provides its output, which completes the read process. One drawback of some conventional sense amplifier applications, such as for example for a memory array, is the relatively long time delay from thestart of the read process to the output of the data. This delay is primarily due to the time required for the sense amplifier to sense the data from the bitlines, as the bitlines have relatively large capacitances. This capacitance is a result of the bitlines' relatively large length, as the bitlines typically span the entire length of the memory array. To mitigate this issue, several techniques have been employed to improve the sense amplifier's speed. One approach is to use a precharge circuit to precharge the bitlines to a known voltage level before the read process. This reduces the time needed for the sense amplifier to sense the data, as the bitlines are already partially charged. Another strategy is to use a voltage-sensing sense amplifier, which is faster as it senses the voltage level on the bitlines rather than the current. This is particularly useful for high-speed applications. Additionally, the use of over-voltage or over-current techniques can further enhance the sense amplifier's performance. Last year I saw a lot of people choosing a word for the year. Now that, I can do. One word to focus on, instead of lots of unrealistic goals? Yes, please. My word last year was “intentional”. The definition of intention is “a determination to act in a certaIn way”. My desire was to be more intentional about how I spent my time, more intentional about the words I wrote, and the words I spoke. More intentional in every aspect of my life. While I can’t say that I applied this 100% of the time, it was on my mind often, to stop and think about how i wanted to spend my day. What I wanted to get out of my time with my children, my time with my husband, my alone time. He wears the crown with pride unearned As crowds adore him like a learned. "Behold!" he cries in royal cheer, "The land is mine to keep so dear." Yet whispers fill this golden hall— The people whisper "King Herod's fall." In whispered tones they speak of Christ, A new Messiah born from death. His teachings challenge all the old ways; He promises a kingdom that will sway. "Do not fear," King Herod roars with might, "I'll show you wonders day and night." Yet in his heart he fears what's said And knows deep down it’s just outside The walls of power built so high, By truth the sands of time may fly. texts.full_text: vernment schools, or schools in more rural or less affluent areas, tend to use Bangla. This can make education more accessible to students in areas where English proficiency is less common, while students in English-based schools tend to have more opportunities to study or work in English-speaking or international contexts in the future. Higher education is also offered in Bangla, English, or in the case of international or specialized universities, in English or in the international language of the specialized study. Higher education in Bangladesh is offered in universities, specialized institutions, or in the case of vocational education, in institutions or polytechnics. Bangladesh is also home to specialized institutions, such as the Bangladesh University of Professionals, the Bangladesh University of Textiles, the Bangladesh University of Health Sciences, as well as the Bangladesh Agricultural University, to name a few. Moreover, the education system in Bangladesh is also supported by a well-developed system of education boards, such as the Bangladesh Madrasah Education Board, the Bangladesh Technical Education Board, the University Grants Commission, the Board of Intermediate and Secondary Education, and the Bangladesh Education Board. Despite the well-structured system, Bangladesh is also addressing the challenges of education, such as the need to improve the quality of education, the need to increase the education system's relevance to the labor market, and the need to improve the education of the disadvantaged, such as the poor and the girls.
